title: Secure adopting community; stand up/harmonise a consent-first registry against the standard
context: This task is the Definition of Shipped for the project: a named rare-cancer community must adopt the CDE set and consent/governance toolkit to stand up or harmonise a consent-first registry with their own IRB/REC approval and custody. The project's `verifiedNeed` is false until this task is completed with a real adopter. Depends on rare-cancer-registry-templates-testbank-001 and rare-cancer-registry-templates-partner-001. Gated on a secured adopting community per the partner plan — if none is secured by 2027-01-31, the pivot/mothball rule applies (see PLAN.md).
objective: Secure a named rare-cancer community (patient organisation, natural-history-registry team, or rare-cancer reference network) as the adopting partner and support them to: (1) adopt the CDE set and consent/governance toolkit for a consent-first registry under their own IRB/REC and custody, (2) produce a conformance report (CDE schema + crosswalk round-trip + governance checklist) on synthetic test data, and (3) confirm that no patient data ever flows to this project. Document the adoption and outcomes.
acceptanceCriteria: A named rare-cancer community (patient organisation, registry effort, or reference network) is documented as having adopted the CDE set and consent/governance toolkit.
A conformance report is produced on the adopter's synthetic test data covering: CDE schema validation, crosswalk round-trips (mCODE/OMOP/Phenopackets), and governance checklist.
The adopter confirms in writing that their registry operates under their own IRB/REC approval and consent, and that no patient data flows to this project.
At least one documented adoption or citation is recorded (e.g., adopter's registry documentation, a publication reference, or an upstream contribution).
Outcomes are recorded in `governance/outcomes-log.md`: community name, adoption date, conformance report reference, and the 'no patient data held by this project' confirmation.
output: A `governance/outcomes-log.md` recording the adopting community, the conformance report, and the no-patient-data confirmation, committed via PR with steward and maintainer sign-off.
